info.title: OpenDota API
info.description:
# Introduction
The OpenDota API provides Dota 2 related data including advanced match data extracted from match replays.

You can find data that can be used to convert hero and ability IDs and other information provided by the API from the [dotaconstants](https://github.com/odota/dotaconstants) repository.

You can use the API without a key, but registering for a key allows increased rate limits and usage. Check out the [API page](https://www.opendota.com/api-keys) to learn more.

api_key.name: api_key
api_key.description:
Use an API key to remove monthly call limits and to receive higher rate limits. [Learn more and get your API key](https://www.opendota.com/api-keys).
        Usage example: https://api.opendota.com/api/matches/271145478?api_key=YOUR-API-KEY
        
        API key can also be sent using the authorization header "Authorization: Bearer YOUR-API-KEY"

hero_id.description: The ID value of the hero played

duration_bin.description: Lower bound of number of seconds the match lasted

early_game_items.description: Items bought in the first 10 min of the game, with cost at least 700

mid_game_items.description: Items bought between 10 and 25 min of the game, with cost at least 2000

late_game_items.description: Items bought at least 25 min after game started, with cost at least 4000

hero_id.description: The ID value of the hero played

id.description: The ID value of the hero played

primary_attr.description: Hero primary shorthand attribute name, e.g. 'agi'

items.description: A hero's role in the game

id.description: The ID value of the hero played

lessThanMatchIdParam.name: less_than_match_id
lessThanMatchIdParam.description: Get matches with a match ID lower than this value

minRankParam.name: min_rank
minRankParam.description: Minimum rank for the matches. Ranks are represented by integers (10-15: Herald, 20-25: Guardian, 30-35: Crusader, 40-45: Archon, 50-55: Legend, 60-65: Ancient, 70-75: Divine, 80: Immortal). Each increment represents an additional star.

maxRankParam.name: max_rank
maxRankParam.description: Maximum rank for the matches. Ranks are represented by integers (10-15: Herald, 20-25: Guardian, 30-35: Crusader, 40-45: Archon, 50-55: Legend, 60-65: Ancient, 70-75: Divine, 80: Immortal). Each increment represents an additional star.

get.description: Recent matches played (limited number of results)
Matches played (full history, and supports column selection)

verified.name: RAWG.io
verified.tagline: RAWG.io — free tier with API key
verified.description: RAWG.io exposes a free-tier JSON API. Register for an API key if required; we verified a public or demo endpoint.

info.title: RAWG Video Games Database API
info.description:
The largest open video games database.

### Why build on RAWG
- More than 350,000 games for 50 platforms including mobiles.
- Rich metadata: tags, genres, developers, publishers, individual creators, official websites, release dates,
Metacritic ratings.
- Where to buy: links to digital distribution services
- Similar games based on visual similarity.
- Player activity data: Steam average playtime and RAWG player counts and ratings.
- Actively developing and constantly getting better by user contribution and our algorithms.

### Terms of Use
- Free for personal use as long as you attribute RAWG as the source of the data and/or images and add an active
hyperlink from every page where the data of RAWG is used.
- Free for commercial use for startups and hobby projects with not more than 100,000 monthly active users or 500,000
page views per month. If your project is larger than that, email us at [api@rawg.io](mailto:api@rawg.io) for
commercial terms.
- No cloning. It would not be cool if you used our API to launch a clone of RAWG. We know it is not always easy
to say what is a duplicate and what isn't. Drop us a line at [api@rawg.io](mailto:api@rawg.io) if you are in doubt,
and we will talk it through.
- You must include an API key with every request. The key can be obtained at https://rawg.io/apidocs.
If you don’t provide it, we may ban your requests.

__[Read more](https://rawg.io/apidocs)__.
